body.u: The summer of 1978 I got a job with the building {Illegible}. My life was getting better and I like the work that I was doing. In the weekend I was playing rugby and football for the {Ireland}.

In September 78 I went to do collagecollege at CaterburyCanterbury to do a Appearshipapprenticehip for the Building industry for 3 year. But I came out of Collage when I was 20 with working on a building site I has a accident when I fell of the building. Then I had {corncevions??} with 2 broken legs and a {bouts warmer??} I was in hospitellhospital for 6 month. After I came out of hospitellhospital I mettermet a girl name Dawn.
After I year we {decided? Spelt very strange} to get married and after 6 month we got married in the Abbey at Minster.
In 1983 I went to West Germany for a course which taketook 2 years and 2 months.
Then I set for Dawn to come and live in Germany.

After 9 months latterlater Dawn had a baby boy called Andrew John {omitted in anon version} after to 2 month it died with the {caran in youth??}. Then we {went?} to Australia and Dawn had a baby girl who we called Jean Dawn Birmingham.
Then when I was 35 my father died he was 71 and when I got the sack from by {late illegible}
When I was 50 my mother died the age of 88.
When we got a {illegible} when I was 65 I {illegible}
